---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new review/audit skill for the collection
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement, new-skill
---

**What quality question does it answer?**
One sentence, e.g. "Does this repo handle rate limits and backoff correctly?"

**Why it's not already covered**
How it differs from the existing skills (see the README table). We don't add skills that duplicate an existing one.

**Meets the bar?** (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Repo-aware — reads real code, cites `file:line`
- [ ] Scored — 0–100 + grade + verdict
- [ ] Self-contained — works after being copied into `.claude/skills/`
- [ ] Opinionated — ranks fixes, names trade-offs

**Scoring dimensions you'd propose**
Rough list with weights.

**Are you up for writing it?**
We love PRs. Happy to help shape it first.
